# Official TOON spec fixtures that are intentionally deferred by this crate.
# Format: <decode|encode>/<fixture-file>.json::<test name>
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses list arrays with empty items
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses list arrays with deeply nested objects
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses list items whose first field is a tabular array
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses single-field list-item object with tabular array
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses arrays of arrays within objects
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses nested arrays of primitives
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses quoted strings and mixed lengths in nested arrays
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses empty inner arrays
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses mixed-length inner arrays
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses root-level primitive array inline
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses root-level array of uniform objects in tabular format
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses root-level array of non-uniform objects in list format
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses root-level array mixing primitive, object, and array of objects in list format
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses root-level array of arrays
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses empty root-level array
decode/arrays-nested.json::parses arrays mixing objects and arrays
decode/blank-lines.json::throws on blank line inside list array
decode/blank-lines.json::throws on blank line inside tabular array
decode/blank-lines.json::throws on multiple blank lines inside array
decode/blank-lines.json::throws on blank line with spaces inside array
decode/delimiters.json::parses tabular arrays with tab delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses tabular arrays with pipe delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses nested arrays with tab delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses nested arrays with pipe delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses root-level array with tab delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses root-level array with pipe delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses root-level array of objects with tab delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses root-level array of objects with pipe delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::does not require quoting commas with tab delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses nested array values containing pipe delimiter
decode/delimiters.json::parses nested array values containing tab delimiter
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts correct indentation with custom indent size (4 spaces with indent=4)
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts tabs in quoted string values
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts tabs in quoted keys
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts tabs in quoted array elements
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts non-multiple indentation when strict=false
decode/indentation-errors.json::accepts deeply nested non-multiples when strict=false
decode/numbers.json::parses exponent notation
decode/numbers.json::parses exponent notation with uppercase E
decode/numbers.json::parses negative exponent notation
decode/numbers.json::treats unquoted leading-zero number as string
decode/numbers.json::treats unquoted multi-leading-zero as string
decode/numbers.json::treats unquoted octal-like as string
decode/numbers.json::treats unquoted negative leading-zero number as string
decode/objects.json::parses empty nested object header
decode/objects.json::bare key: with no children decodes as empty object, not array
decode/objects.json::treats extra brackets after valid array segment as literal key (non-strict)
decode/objects.json::treats non-integer bracket content as literal key (non-strict)
decode/objects.json::treats text between bracket segment and colon as literal key (non-strict)
decode/path-expansion.json::throws on expansion conflict (object vs primitive) when strict=true
decode/path-expansion.json::throws on expansion conflict (object vs array) when strict=true
decode/path-expansion.json::expands keys creating empty nested objects
decode/primitives.json::parses safe unquoted string
decode/primitives.json::parses unquoted string with underscore and numbers
decode/primitives.json::parses empty quoted string
decode/primitives.json::parses quoted string with newline escape
decode/primitives.json::parses quoted string with tab escape
decode/primitives.json::parses quoted string with carriage return escape
decode/primitives.json::parses quoted string with backslash escape
decode/primitives.json::parses quoted string with escaped quotes
decode/primitives.json::parses Unicode string
decode/primitives.json::parses Chinese characters
decode/primitives.json::parses emoji
decode/primitives.json::parses string with emoji and spaces
decode/primitives.json::parses positive integer
decode/primitives.json::parses decimal number
decode/primitives.json::parses negative integer
decode/primitives.json::parses true
decode/primitives.json::parses false
decode/primitives.json::parses null
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for true
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for false
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for null
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for integer
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for negative decimal
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for scientific notation
decode/primitives.json::respects ambiguity quoting for leading-zero
decode/primitives.json::decodes supplementary scalar (U+1F680) in quoted string as literal UTF-8
decode/root-form.json::parses single primitive string at root as primitive
decode/root-form.json::parses single primitive number at root as primitive
decode/root-form.json::parses single primitive boolean at root as primitive
decode/root-form.json::parses literal [] at root as empty array
decode/validation-errors.json::throws on duplicate sibling keys in strict mode
decode/validation-errors.json::throws on bracket length with leading zeros in strict mode
decode/validation-errors.json::throws on nested duplicate sibling keys in strict mode
decode/validation-errors.json::throws on duplicate keys within a list-item object in strict mode
decode/whitespace.json::parses empty tokens as empty string
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes nested arrays of primitives
encode/arrays-nested.json::quotes strings containing delimiters in nested arrays
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes empty inner arrays
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes mixed-length inner arrays
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes root-level primitive array
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes root-level array of uniform objects in tabular format
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes root-level array of non-uniform objects in list format
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes root-level array mixing primitive, object, and array of objects in list format
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes root-level arrays of arrays
encode/arrays-nested.json::encodes empty root-level array
encode/arrays-nested.json::uses list format for arrays mixing objects and arrays
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses list format for objects containing arrays of arrays
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses tabular format for nested uniform object arrays
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses list format for nested object arrays with mismatched keys
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses canonical encoding for multi-field list-item objects with tabular arrays
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses canonical encoding for single-field list-item tabular arrays
encode/arrays-objects.json::encodes empty object list items as bare hyphen
encode/arrays-objects.json::uses expanded list for arrays containing empty objects
encode/delimiters.json::encodes tabular arrays with tab delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes tabular arrays with pipe delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes nested arrays with tab delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes nested arrays with pipe delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes root-level array with tab delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes root-level array with pipe delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes root-level array of objects with tab delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::encodes root-level array of objects with pipe delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::does not quote commas in tabular values with tab delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::quotes nested array values containing pipe delimiter
encode/delimiters.json::quotes nested array values containing tab delimiter
encode/key-folding.json::encodes folded chain ending with empty object
encode/objects.json::encodes empty nested object
encode/primitives.json::encodes safe strings without quotes
encode/primitives.json::encodes safe string with underscore and numbers
encode/primitives.json::quotes empty string
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like true
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like false
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like null
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like integer
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like negative decimal
encode/primitives.json::quotes string that looks like scientific notation
encode/primitives.json::quotes string with leading zero
encode/primitives.json::escapes newline in string
encode/primitives.json::escapes tab in string
encode/primitives.json::escapes carriage return in string
encode/primitives.json::escapes backslash in string
encode/primitives.json::quotes string with array-like syntax
encode/primitives.json::quotes string starting with hyphen-space
encode/primitives.json::quotes string with bracket notation
encode/primitives.json::quotes string with brace notation
encode/primitives.json::encodes Unicode string without quotes
encode/primitives.json::encodes Chinese characters without quotes
encode/primitives.json::encodes emoji without quotes
encode/primitives.json::encodes string with emoji and spaces
encode/primitives.json::encodes positive integer
encode/primitives.json::encodes decimal number
encode/primitives.json::encodes negative integer
encode/primitives.json::encodes zero
encode/primitives.json::encodes negative zero as zero
encode/primitives.json::encodes scientific notation as decimal
encode/primitives.json::encodes small decimal from scientific notation
encode/primitives.json::encodes large number
encode/primitives.json::encodes MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
encode/primitives.json::encodes repeating decimal with full precision
encode/primitives.json::encodes true
encode/primitives.json::encodes false
encode/primitives.json::encodes null
encode/whitespace.json::respects custom indent size option
